summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Neo Circular Ledger - a role-based sustainability platform. Successfully tested login, dashboards, navigation, and core UI functionality for all 4 user roles (Village Ward, CBG Plant Operator, Investor, Admin). Identified dropdown interaction issues in forms.

ui_bugs.issue: Custom dropdown selection not working properly - options not clickable
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents completion of waste entry and processing log forms

passed_tests: Login page loads with email/password form
Quick login with Village Ward demo account (ramesh@ward.in / ward123) redirects to /ward dashboard
Quick login with CBG Plant Operator demo account (ops@greengas.in / plant123) redirects to /plant dashboard
Quick login with Investor demo account (priya@invest.in / invest123) redirects to /investor dashboard
Quick login with Admin demo account (admin@neo.in / admin123) redirects to /admin dashboard
Village Ward dashboard shows KPI cards (Total Waste: 3,100 kg, Total Earnings: Rs 8,100, Carbon Credits: 5.20 tCO2e, Efficiency Score: 75%)
CBG Plant Operator dashboard shows capacity utilization (11%), processing KPIs (Received: 5,700 kg, CBG Output: 288.5 kg)
Investor dashboard shows ESG metrics (CO2: 425 tons, Waste: 305T, Jobs: 103) and investment KPIs (Invested: Rs 12,50,000, Returns: Rs 1,98,500)
Admin dashboard shows system-wide KPIs (Biomass: 14.5T, Processed: 7.9T, Users: 8)
Admin users page shows all users table (5 users displayed)
Admin ledger page shows transactions with filter buttons
Sidebar navigation works correctly for each role
Logout button works and returns to login page
Investment dialog allows entering amount and opens correctly
Marketplace filter buttons work (all, high, medium, low performance)
All role-specific page routing works correctly
Auto-calculation preview shows in waste entry form (displays carbon credits and payment estimates)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix custom Select/dropdown components interaction issue. The shadcn/ui Select components are not allowing proper option selection, preventing form submissions in waste entry and processing log forms. This is a critical UI bug that blocks core functionality.
